headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 15, 2026**
article:
The Colorado Rockies fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 7-2, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the Rockies' offense with 3 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs. The Washington Nationals suffered a historic 15-1 loss to the Cincinnati Reds, with JJ Bleday contributing 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs for the Nationals. The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh (right oblique strain), Colorado Rockies pitcher Jimmy Herget (right shoulder impingement), Athletics pitcher Brooks Kriske (right shoulder impingement), Miami Marlins pitcher Robby Snelling (left elbow UCL sprain), New York Mets catcher Francisco Alvarez (right meniscus tear), Cincinnati Reds pitcher Rhett Lowder (right shoulder pain), Los Angeles Angels pitcher Drew Pomeranz (left elbow inflammation), and Baltimore Orioles outfielder Dylan Beavers (right oblique strain).

The Seattle Mariners made a trade, sending left-handed pitcher José Suarez to the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks acquired outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates. Ryan O'Hearn led the Rockies' offense with 3 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals were defeated by the Cincinnati Reds 15-1 in a one-sided game. JJ Bleday led the Nationals' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Tigers 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts. Gage Workman led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Rout Marlins 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Miami Marlins, winning 9-1 behind a strong outing from Zebby Matthews. Matthews pitched 7.0 innings, striking out 5 and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Raleigh Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain.

top_news.title: **Mariners Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners have made a trade, sending LHP José Suarez to the Athletics in exchange for cash.
